title: Romantic Earthy Jamaican Prawns Poke
description: A dish featuring raw king prawns, earthy flavors, and a silky texture, perfect for a romantic dinner. This recipe is inspired by Jamaican cuisine and follows Ayurvedic and Sattvic principles.
instructions: Rinse the king prawns under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Place the prawns in an ice bath for 10 minutes to shock them and stop the cooking process.
Peel and chop the ginger into small pieces.
In a blender or food processor, combine the coconut water, avocado, cilantro, dill, ginger, garlic, lime juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
Add the hemp seeds to the bowl if using.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss them to coat with the marinade, being careful not to break them.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with additional cilantro and dill if desired.
Serve the prawns in small bowls or on a platter, garnished with edible flowers or microgreens if desired.
